title: The ability to sort/Filter groups in different ways on the same board without creating new views
excerpt: It would be very useful to have the ability to sort and filter groups on the same board in different ways without having to create multiple views.

posts.author: MandyJ (Amanda)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be very useful to have the ability to sort and filter groups on the same board in different ways without having to create multiple views.

posts.author: rikazkhan (rikaz)
posts.cookedHtml: That would indeed be a great feature for productivity tools or project management software. Having the ability to sort and filter groups dynamically on the same board, without needing to create separate views, would save time and reduce clutter.
